name: yezzmedia/laravel-ops-backups
description: Ops-facing backup posture, retention visibility, and restore readiness package for the Yezz Media Laravel platform.

suggest.spatie/laravel-activitylog: Optional audit persistence driver for ops backups audit events.
suggest.yezzmedia/laravel-ops-infrastructure: Optional infrastructure enrichment for backup target and destination visibility.
suggest.yezzmedia/laravel-ops-security: Optional security enrichment for backup encryption readiness visibility.
suggest.yezzmedia/laravel-ops-sites: Optional site-scoped backup target enrichment for restore-readiness visibility.
